'''masïfdhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arabesquing|arabesquing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arabesquing|arabesquing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| masïfdhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mæsïfdhïfth || mæsïfdhïfj || mæsïfdhïfsh || mæsïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || masïfsïfdhïfth || masïfsïfdhïfj || masïfsïfdhïfsh || masïfsïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || masïfdhïfth || masïfdhïfj || masïfdhïfsh || masïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || masïffdhïffth || masïffdhïffj || masïffdhïffsh || masïffdhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || masïfdhïfïf || masïfdhïfïf || masïfdhïfïf || masïfdhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || masïfdhïfth || masïfdhïfj || masïfdhïfsh || masïfdhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || masïfdhïfïfl || masïfdhïfïfl || masïfdhïfïfl || masïfdhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || masïfdhïfïfïf || masïfdhïfïfïf || masïfdhïfïfïf || masïfdhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || masïfdhïfïfn || masïfdhïfïfn || masïfdhïfïfn || masïfdhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || masïfdhïfïforo || masïfdhïfïforo || masïfdhïfïforo || masïfdhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
